svg.title: HireFlow HRMS — Architecture and workflow diagram
svg.desc: Full system architecture showing frontend, backend, third-party services, and the complete hiring workflow from candidate application to employee onboarding.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What can the management admin do in HireFlow?')
sendPrompt('What can the senior manager do in HireFlow?')
sendPrompt('What can the HR recruiter do in HireFlow?')
sendPrompt('What can an employee do in HireFlow?')
sendPrompt('What can a candidate do in HireFlow?')
sendPrompt('How does a recruiter post a job in HireFlow?')
sendPrompt('How does a candidate apply for a job?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI resume screening work?')
sendPrompt('What are the stages in the HireFlow application pipeline?')
g.text: Applied → Screened → Interview Scheduled → Interviewed → Offered → Hired

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the AI interview work in HireFlow?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a candidate is marked as hired?')
sendPrompt('What is automatically created when someone is hired?')
g.text: Employee record · User account · firstname.lastname@hireflow.com · Onboarding · Credentials email
